cases.prompt: Verify a Laravel endpoint and React form change using the ready delivery contract.
assertions: Orders focused evidence before broad suites
Requires build and smoke or browser evidence
Reports exact outcomes and acceptance IDs

cases.prompt: Verify an internal Laravel model change with no browser-visible behavior.
assertions: Skips frontend build and E2E with reasons
Runs broad tests after narrow checks

cases.prompt: Verify a user-facing Livewire workflow when no smoke or browser command is configured.
assertions: Routes the gap back to setup or contract amendment
